curation_notes: Patch commit 293b106 on GitHub corresponds to 3f47b17393 in the repository history (same message 'FIX: SQLi in contact groups form (#11869)'). The original commit SHA was unreachable via fetch but the equivalent merge commit was found via git log --grep. The patch changes a single file (formContactGroup.php) replacing direct string concatenation of $cg_id into a SQL query with a prepared statement using bindValue. Two sibling files (formHostGroup.php, formEscalation.php) in adjacent configObject directories contain the identical vulnerability pattern — unsanitized identifier interpolation into SQL query strings. Pre-assigned class sql-injection confirmed by both the CWE-89 mapping and the patch diff.
